title: jrodolfo/local-genai-lab
summary: Local-first GenAI lab with a React frontend and Spring Boot backend, supporting Ollama, Amazon Bedrock, Hugging Face, RAG document retrieval, MCP-backed AWS tools, streaming chat, persistent sessions, and artifact/report workflows.

title: Chimdiiii/OpenMemory
summary: 🧠 Enhance AI with OpenMemory for long-term memory storage, recall, and explanation, using a unique cognitive architecture.

title: hesamaria/rag-chatbot
summary: 🧠 Build a RAG-driven chatbot to answer user questions using real-world knowledge from documents, focused on mental health and social policy in Indonesia.

title: Aniketsoni2002/lumen
summary: Lumen — an agentic RAG system that decides when to search your docs, the web, or compute. Hybrid retrieval, self-reflection, conversation memory & streaming. Fully local (Ollama + LangGraph).

title: JeanSebastienBash/PromptDeMerde
summary: Turn drafts into prompts with local Ollama. In-browser STT dictation, profile ZIP export, 12 languages. MIT, no account, zero telemetry. promptdemerde.com or self-host PHP.

title: BuffaloTechRider/Autodidact
summary: Self-learning AI agent that gets smarter and cheaper over time. Routes between local and cloud LLMs, learns from every interaction, remembers everything.

title: wsj-br/transrewrt
summary: AI-powered text tool: translate between languages, rewrite in different styles, and transform with custom prompts. Supports OpenRouter, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, DeepSeek, Groq, Mistral, xAI, Ollama, and more. Runs as an Electron app (Windows/Linux) or a self-hosted Docker web app (amd64/arm64).

title: arn0ld87/agora
summary: Self-hosted GraphRAG + multi-agent social-media simulator. Upload a doc → build a knowledge graph → spawn persona-driven agents → generate a report. Ollama & Neo4j instead of Cloud-APIs. DACH-first. Lokaler Multi-Agent-Social-Media-Simulator mit GraphRAG-Pipeline. Dokument hoch, Knowledge-Graph bauen, Personas spawnen, Report raus. Ollama + Neo4j

title: kagura-ai/memory-cloud
summary: Adaptive memory for AI agents & teams — beyond RAG. Self-hosted MCP server that gets smarter every time you search: hybrid search + a neural memory graph that learns. Works with Claude, ChatGPT & any MCP client.

title: 0xfa-ni/Cyberbot-Uncensored-Offline-chatbot
summary: **CyberBot** is a fully offline AI-powered cybersecurity assistant built with Python, PyQt6, Ollama, and SQLite. It provides private, local AI chat capabilities for penetration testers, security analysts, CTF players, and cybersecurity students. All conversations remain on the user's machine, with no cloud services, API keys, or internet connection

title: marcimastro98/Xenon
summary: A 100% local, all-in-one dashboard for the CORSAIR Xeneon Edge (and any Windows browser). System monitor, media & mic, a voice AI that can build dashboard pages for you, a Stream-Deck grid, RGB lighting, and Twitch/OBS control. Free, open-source, no account.

summary: 🚀 Simplify API management with Ollama API Pool, a robust solution for seamless integration and optimized performance in your projects.
